title: [IVE] 你地係咪真係想簡BSE? 請你地睇一睇

replies.msg:
致各位DSE/FD同學仔，會係來年將會讀IVE BSE的人。其本上你報得就收你....因為都收好多人

先講下背景:
以IVE Engineering黎講，BSE都真係幾多人讀，有三間院校，分別係屯門，摩理臣山，沙田。
摩理臣山BSE係最耐歷史。師資GOOD GOOD嫁...我覺得
沙田係最多人簡既院校，人數最多，（可能有幼教既關係，但食女果個唔係你囉）
屯門有killer...佢今年轉左過去...屯門既朋友就GG了

讀完BS最大嘅好處就係可以有個電B牌。呢個我相信係IVE BS最大嘅賣點。

如何拿高GPA?
1. 全部既計數科，只要你有操past paper，操3年以上，拿A係冇問題。Lab要做得靚靚仔仔，抄多d字。呀SIR見到你多字都會比高分少少你嫁啦。
2. 背書科就要睇miss/呀sir囉，最好大家識埋對面院校既同學仔，互相交換資訊。
3. Group project/FYP，搵下師兄/taobao幫下你。自己小心啦。都要識擦鞋。
4. 英文科同中文科，最重要係識擦鞋。NLP/CA 盡拿高分。overall 最後有B-以上係唔難。如果英文底好少少，做乜嘢都會事半功倍。

就業
intern 好重要! 要簡一個好既公司。佢會影影響你個FYP 成績/..因為有48個credit,好撚重。如果知自己升唔到大學就係intern公司做好D...佢地九成九都會請番你。如埋出邊有好多BS既工公司。FG有13K-15K... 記得搵一間肯幫你寫5年working experience 既公司..幫你地簽B牌。

升學
BSE 升學 大學只有polyU BSE一間 (UGC) 升 year 3, GPA最好過3.6...最好你係女仔....女仔就會有易D入。都好睇英文...(溫馨提示:小心個in你...好串/...串過馬撚...但忍住..想入BSE 就要過到佢果關 )。仲有一間就係Thei...GPA:2.9啦最少...都好既....但係貴囉....同埋岩岩搞...好多野都好新....但兩間都係HKIE認可的...(THEI係暫認可)。

另外就係各大院校既Mechanical Engineering.... (top-up就不了, )因為香港讀完ME都好多出黎都係做番BS....一樣姐。仲有city fire (PT), THEI (PT), POLY SPEED (ME FT,PT), SHADE 呢D GPA相對收分冇咁高...

想同你地講
BSE唔會搵唔到工,但人工唔會好高。慢慢做下５－６年,拿到個B牌真係幾好嫁，之後人工會２０Ｋ以上。你叻仔既就會做到工程師....呢一行慢慢做下野,又可以有其他TOP-UP DEGREE 去SUPPORT 你。真心係唔錯...岩哂一D成績中中等等..平平凡凡搵3-4萬一個月再結婚生仔。只要香港仲有building....BS一定會有工作。 如果唔小心讀左BSE既同學仔...祝你好運。如果.,,真係想升學..讀ASSO...HKCC多女又易入8大。我讀IVE都咁話嫁啦。因為IVE真係學店黎嫁屌佢老母。讀IVE最緊要係學識做人....識擦鞋...識朋友...

對手
有BSE HD/ASSO 仲有2間院校。city BSE ASSO + POLY BSE HD, 冇錯..人地做咩都威過你地IVE仔..同埋有本部既照顧。升學提供左最大既保障。讀人地院校囉屌! 我都建議讀!
IVE BSE 各科小弟既分析: 希望幫到你地
=計數科,有做PP就一定A到..做多D操多D,操到佢老母臭系。
=背書科,識人好重要!要多D與同學仔分享TIPS,多做PP...因為黎黎去去都係會考果D,,保你B以上。信MISS必勝!
=語文科,睇你識唔識擦鞋同語文底好唔好,同MISS/呀SIR關係OK既,大家都識做 C+或以上
=Project系列,小心簡組員...因為一份project入邊會最少有2-3份report/presentation。難A的...正常都有B以上
=垃圾科,唔計GPA,有出席就得。

SEM 1
Engineering Science for BS
Engineering Mathematics for BS
English and Communication: Workplace Interaction
Information Technology Essentials - Service (搵人幫你做功課就得, 識擦鞋)
Building Technology
Electrical Services Fundamentals
Building Services Drawing (自己係屋企多多練習...最緊要快快快快快快..速度)
Whole Person Development: Self-Efficacy Enhancement

SEM 2
Vocational Chinese Communication: Putonghua Conversation and Reports
Piped Services and Fire Safety Installations A
Electrical Installations A
English and Communication: Workplace Correspondence
Construction Management and Supervisory Skills
Whole Person Development: SMART in Action
HVAC Technology

SEM 3 (呢個SEM會同時出現兩個GROUP PROJECT...)
Whole Person Development: Global Vision
English and Communication: Persuasive Presentations
BS Software Applications
BS System Design A
Electrical Installations B
自選Elective (簡一個你覺得自己有利既科)

SEM 4 (有A/B餐, 我建議鍾意靠自己既人簡A餐, 靠人地FREE RIDER既簡B餐)
Whole Person Development: Integrated Career Development
Vocational Chinese Communication: Putonghua Presentations, Administrative and Technical Text Writing
Indoor Environment and HVAC Systems
English and Communication: Promotional Materials
Piped Services and Fire Safety Installations B (A餐)
Energy Management in Building(B餐)
Building Information Modeling in BS Design(B餐)
BS System Design B
Electrical Services and Building Management Systems (A餐)
Practical Training (Building Services)

SEM 5
Commissioning and Maintenance
Industrial Attachment
English and Communication: Reports
Industry-Based Student Project (大佬黎)

獎學金問題

quote.msg:
致各位DSE/FD同學仔，會係來年將會讀IVE BSE的人。其本上你報得就收你....因為都收好多人

先講下背景:
以IVE Engineering黎講，BSE都真係幾多人讀，有三間院校，分別係屯門，摩理臣山，沙田。
摩理臣山BSE係最耐歷史。師資GOOD GOOD嫁...我覺得
沙田係最多人簡既院校，人數最多，（可能有幼教既關係，但食女果個唔係你囉）
屯門有killer...佢今年轉左過去...屯門既朋友就GG了

讀完BS最大嘅好處就係可以有個電B牌。呢個我相信係IVE BS最大嘅賣點。

如何拿高GPA?
1. 全部既計數科，只要你有操past paper，操3年以上，拿A係冇問題。Lab要做得靚靚仔仔，抄多d字。呀SIR見到你多字都會比高分少少你嫁啦。
2. 背書科就要睇miss/呀sir囉，最好大家識埋對面院校既同學仔，互相交換資訊。
3. Group project/FYP，搵下師兄/taobao幫下你。自己小心啦。都要識擦鞋。
4. 英文科同中文科，最重要係識擦鞋。NLP/CA 盡拿高分。overall 最後有B-以上係唔難。如果英文底好少少，做乜嘢都會事半功倍。

就業
intern 好重要! 要簡一個好既公司。佢會影影響你個FYP 成績/..因為有48個credit,好撚重。如果知自己升唔到大學就係intern公司做好D...佢地九成九都會請番你。如埋出邊有好多BS既工公司。FG有13K-15K... 記得搵一間肯幫你寫5年working experience 既公司..幫你地簽B牌。

升學
BSE 升學 大學只有polyU BSE一間 (UGC) 升 year 3, GPA最好過3.6...最好你係女仔....女仔就會有易D入。都好睇英文...(溫馨提示:小心個in你...好串/...串過馬撚...但忍住..想入BSE 就要過到佢果關 )。仲有一間就係Thei...GPA:2.9啦最少...都好既....但係貴囉....同埋岩岩搞...好多野都好新....但兩間都係HKIE認可的...(THEI係暫認可)。

另外就係各大院校既Mechanical Engineering.... (top-up就不了, )因為香港讀完ME都好多出黎都係做番BS....一樣姐。仲有city fire (PT), THEI (PT), POLY SPEED (ME FT,PT), SHADE 呢D GPA相對收分冇咁高...

想同你地講
BSE唔會搵唔到工,但人工唔會好高。慢慢做下５－６年,拿到個B牌真係幾好嫁，之後人工會２０Ｋ以上。你叻仔既就會做到工程師....呢一行慢慢做下野,又可以有其他TOP-UP DEGREE 去SUPPORT 你。真心係唔錯...岩哂一D成績中中等等..平平凡凡搵3-4萬一個月再結婚生仔。只要香港仲有building....BS一定會有工作。 如果唔小心讀左BSE既同學仔...祝你好運。如果.,,真係想升學..讀ASSO...HKCC多女又易入8大。我讀IVE都咁話嫁啦。因為IVE真係學店黎嫁屌佢老母。讀IVE最緊要係學識做人....識擦鞋...識朋友...

對手
有BSE HD/ASSO 仲有2間院校。city BSE ASSO + POLY BSE HD, 冇錯..人地做咩都威過你地IVE仔..同埋有本部既照顧。升學提供左最大既保障。讀人地院校囉屌! 我都建議讀!
IVE BSE 各科小弟既分析: 希望幫到你地
=計數科,有做PP就一定A到..做多D操多D,操到佢老母臭系。
=背書科,識人好重要!要多D與同學仔分享TIPS,多做PP...因為黎黎去去都係會考果D,,保你B以上。信MISS必勝!
=語文科,睇你識唔識擦鞋同語文底好唔好,同MISS/呀SIR關係OK既,大家都識做 C+或以上
=Project系列,小心簡組員...因為一份project入邊會最少有2-3份report/presentation。難A的...正常都有B以上
=垃圾科,唔計GPA,有出席就得。

SEM 1
Engineering Science for BS
Engineering Mathematics for BS
English and Communication: Workplace Interaction
Information Technology Essentials - Service (搵人幫你做功課就得, 識擦鞋)
Building Technology
Electrical Services Fundamentals
Building Services Drawing (自己係屋企多多練習...最緊要快快快快快快..速度)
Whole Person Development: Self-Efficacy Enhancement

SEM 2
Vocational Chinese Communication: Putonghua Conversation and Reports
Piped Services and Fire Safety Installations A
Electrical Installations A
English and Communication: Workplace Correspondence
Construction Management and Supervisory Skills
Whole Person Development: SMART in Action
HVAC Technology

SEM 3 (呢個SEM會同時出現兩個GROUP PROJECT...)
Whole Person Development: Global Vision
English and Communication: Persuasive Presentations
BS Software Applications
BS System Design A
Electrical Installations B
自選Elective (簡一個你覺得自己有利既科)

SEM 4 (有A/B餐, 我建議鍾意靠自己既人簡A餐, 靠人地FREE RIDER既簡B餐)
Whole Person Development: Integrated Career Development
Vocational Chinese Communication: Putonghua Presentations, Administrative and Technical Text Writing
Indoor Environment and HVAC Systems
English and Communication: Promotional Materials
Piped Services and Fire Safety Installations B (A餐)
Energy Management in Building(B餐)
Building Information Modeling in BS Design(B餐)
BS System Design B
Electrical Services and Building Management Systems (A餐)
Practical Training (Building Services)

SEM 5
Commissioning and Maintenance
Industrial Attachment
English and Communication: Reports
Industry-Based Student Project (大佬黎)
